hero.title: Drive the Silk Road on your own terms.
hero.sub: Modern UzAuto Chevrolet and new Chinese SUVs, collected in Tashkent and ready for Samarkand, Bukhara and beyond. Unlimited horizons, honest prices.

fleet.title: Choose your ride
fleet.sub: From city runabouts to desert-ready SUVs — every car serviced, insured and Silk-Road tested.

routes.title: Where the road takes you
routes.sub: Curated Silk Road routes with distances and drive times from Tashkent.

addons.title: Make it yours
addons.sub: Add a driver, insurance and extras — toggle them on when you reserve.

reviews.title: Travelers, in their words
reviews.r1: Picked up in Tashkent, dropped in Samarkand — spotless car and the team knew every chaikhana worth stopping at.
reviews.r2: Booked a driver for the Bukhara–Khiva leg. Stress-free desert highway and fair, transparent pricing.
reviews.r3: Seven of us plus luggage in the Captiva, child seats ready on arrival. Airport delivery made day one effortless.

cta.title: Your Uzbekistan road trip starts here.
cta.sub: Free cancellation up to 48h · Airport delivery · 24/7 roadside help.
